name: hermes-agentrouter
description: Connect Hermes Desktop and CLI to AgentRouter through Qwen ACP using GLM 5.2.

interface.shortDescription: Install and manage AgentRouter for Hermes with GLM 5.2.
interface.longDescription: Detects Hermes Desktop and CLI, securely stores the AgentRouter token, installs Qwen ACP, configures GLM 5.2, validates the connection, and provides launch and uninstall commands.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install or troubleshoot AgentRouter for Hermes using GLM 5.2.
